name: HTTP/2 Phase 4A: Bridge Integration and E2E Testing

description: Baseline: Phase 4A foundation complete. Tasks 1-4 done (bridge, frame loop, HPACK, response conversion). Starting Task 5 (full integration).
Phase 4A Task 5: Full bridge integration methods. Request queueing, stream management, FIFO scheduling. 5 new tests. Tests: 242/242 passing (+5 from 237). Integration methods complete.
Phase 4A Task 5: Connection pooling and data accumulation. Response/request data methods with size limits. 6 new tests. Tests: 248/248 passing (+6 from 242). Full stream lifecycle working.

name: HTTP/2 Phase 4A Integration: Bridge Integration with tls_mitm

description: Baseline: Phase 4A complete with 251 tests. Starting Integration Task - H2ProxyBridge integration with tls_mitm.rs for production deployment.
Integration: H2ProxyBridge detection in tls_mitm.rs. Bridge initialization with proper config for HTTP/1.1 proxies. Zero regressions (251/251 tests). Event loop implementation next.
Tests: H2ProxyBridge integration tests + test fixes. 8 new integration tests, 2 existing test fixes. 251/251 lib tests passing. Zero regressions. Bridge integration complete and tested.

name: SCRED Phase 4C: HTTP/2 Flow Control (WINDOW_UPDATE) Support

description: Baseline (Integration complete): 251 tests. Starting Phase 4C - HTTP/2 Flow Control (WINDOW_UPDATE) support. Will add stream-level window tracking and flow control handling.

Phase 4C Task 1: Flow Control (WINDOW_UPDATE) Integration. Added FlowController to H2ProxyBridge with per-stream window tracking. 6 new tests (+2.4%), 257/257 passing. Zero regressions. RFC 7540 compliant.
